data.body: Re-certification under the current Ed25519 signing scheme (the parallel opcert epic migrated the completion-signing scheme after this ticket's original close; original attestation now reads unknown_scheme). CI/make-pass evidence: this ticket's change is MERGED to main carrying Verified=+1 (clean-env CI: build/test/lint/typecheck) AND LLM-Review=+1; local make lint/typecheck green; all acceptance-criteria tests present and passing.
